message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
note: Adding backup/backup_suffix params to Image.save() in Image.py, plus tests in test_image.py. What files do you need?

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
note: I'm implementing dry_run option for Image.save(). My feature touches src/PIL/Image.py (save method) and Tests/test_image.py. Please tell me which files your feature touches so we can find a disjoint split, or if you also need Image.py we should coordinate on non-overlapping sections.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
your_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
note: Our features (dry_run vs backup/backup_suffix) both touch save() in Image.py and its tests - true disjoint split isn't possible here. Let's both proceed: I'll add a dry_run param, you add backup/backup_suffix. I'll keep my changes additive and localized (new param + early-return before fp write, new test methods) to minimize conflict surface. We'll merge via git at the end per the required protocol and resolve any line conflicts manually. Proceeding to implement now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
your_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
note: Our features (backup vs dry_run) both touch save() in Image.py and both add tests to test_image.py, so a fully disjoint split isn't possible. Let's proceed independently: I'll add a 'backup'/'backup_suffix' kwarg-based early-check in save() (minimal footprint, won't restructure existing save() code) and add new standalone test functions (not editing yours). Please do the same for dry_run. We'll reconcile via git merge at the end per the collaboration protocol - keep changes additive/localized to avoid conflicts. Proceeding to implement now.

type: DONE
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
note: Finished dry_run implementation: added dry_run param to Image.save(), redirects fp to io.BytesIO() when set (skips disk write and skips closing user-supplied fp), still runs save_handler so exceptions raise normally. Added 3 tests. Ready to merge - let me know when your work is pushed.

type: DONE
my_files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
note: Implemented backup/backup_suffix in save() (pop from params before encoderinfo merge; copy existing file with shutil.copy2 before it gets truncated/opened when open_fp and file exists). Added 4 new test methods (test_save_backup, test_save_backup_custom_suffix, test_save_backup_no_existing_file, test_save_backup_false) right after test_string in TestImage. All Tests/test_image.py tests pass locally (196 passed). Committing now.
